name: Fresh Raspberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and shortening. Beat vigorously for 1 minute.
2. Add the vanilla and eggs. Beat until smooth.
3. Continue beating until the mixture is light and lemon-colored. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
4. Stir in the baking soda with the sour cream. Gradually add the flour alternately with the sour cream, mixing until the batter is smooth.
5. Carefully fold in the raspberries and nuts using a rubber scraper.
6. Spoon the batter into a tube pan and bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
7. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick; it should come out clean.
8. Turn the cake out onto a rack to cool completely before serving.
9. Serve with whipped cream and very ripe raspberries that have been dipped in granulated white sugar.
